name: Jannise Table Lamp - 21 Inch Height - TBL3002 - Natural/Gold - Safavieh
description: Elevate your space with the Jannise 21-inch table lamp. Featuring a natural and gold finish, this lamp brings a touch of elegance and warmth to any room. The combination of concrete and iron provides a unique and stylish look that complements a variety of decor styles. Whether placed on a bedside table or a living room console, Jannise illuminates your space beautifully. The sturdy metal construction ensures a lasting presence in your home. Its understated yet sophisticated design makes it an ideal choice for anyone looking to enhance their lighting collection. Let Jannise be a beacon of refined design in your home.
